heroHeading: Baked with love.<br class="hidden sm:block"> Delivered with care.
heroSubtext: Small-batch artisan baked goods made from scratch in the heart of Texas.
menuIntro: Everything is made to order from scratch. Here's what we're baking right now.
aboutText: Every loaf, every tart, every cookie starts with the best local ingredients I can find and more love than I can measure. Stillwater Bakery is my dream of sharing real, honest baked goods with my East Texas neighbors — one small batch at a time.
